name: Role & permission policy — backend enforcement
description: Implement the server-side permission layer so all household-scoped routes enforce the admin/member matrix from day one without relying on a global active household. Backend: a requireRole(roles[]) middleware factory, an explicit-household membership resolver helper (looks up the caller's role for the household selected on the current request), and a permission-policy module exporting named guards (canManageMembers, canEditAnyExpense, canManageGroups, etc.). Integrate the infra into current household detail/update/delete routes and keep it reusable for feat-012, feat-013, feat-014, and later household-scoped features. Covered by unit tests for each guard and integration tests asserting 403 for active members who lack permission while non-members still receive 404. Per docs/product-specs/role-permission.md. Does NOT include any frontend UI changes.
